title: PivotValue
description: The definition of how a value in a pivot table should be calculated.

summarizeFunction.description: A function to summarize the value.

name.description: A name to use for the value.

calculatedDisplayType.description: If specified, indicates that pivot values should be displayed as the result of a calculation with another pivot value.

sourceColumnOffset.description: The column offset of the source range that this value reads from.

formula.description: A custom formula to calculate the value.
